nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Carlo Piaggia
nodes.summary: Carlo Piaggia是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Abyssinian ground thrush，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Abyssinian ground thrush
nodes.summary: Abyssinian ground thrush（Abyssinian ground thrush，学名 Geokichla piaggiae），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于肯尼亚、Carlo Piaggia，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: 肯尼亚
nodes.summary: 肯尼亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联308种鸟类，包括索马里鸵鸟、南非鸭、Western crested guinea fowl等308种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Abyssinian ground thrush (Geokichla piaggiae) is a thrush from the family Turdidae which is native to north-east Africa where it lives at high altitude in montane forests. Its binomial nomenclature honors the 19th century Italian explorer of East Africa Carlo Piaggia.{{cite journal|title=Carlo Piaggia, the definition of "gallery forests", and forest avifauna in Central Africa|date=31 December 2023|volume=40|pages=157-170|author=Spartaco Gippoliti|author2=Luca Lupi |journal=Boll

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Abyssinian ground thrush (Geokichla piaggiae) is a thrush from the family Turdidae which is native to north-east Africa where it lives at high altitude in montane forests. Its binomial nomenclature honors the 19th century Italian explorer of East Africa Carlo Piaggia.{{cite journal|title=Carlo Piaggia, the definition of "gallery forests", and forest avifauna in Central Africa|date=31 December 2023|volume=40|pages=157-170|author=Spartaco Gippoliti|author2=Luca Lupi |journal=Boll

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The Abyssinian ground thrush occurs in the undergrowth of evergreen montane forest in high rainfall regions between , mostly above , although occasionally found lower
